author: lOrm
content: Fixed in src/modes/mod.rs: added explicit serde rename on the three overlapping Modifier variants (modifier-debug / modifier-methodical / modifier-director) and matching rename on the Preset side (preset-debug / preset-methodical / preset-director). JSON readers now see disambiguated discriminators when both enums appear in the same document. Display impls unchanged so status-bar output stays human-readable; serde_roundtrip_all_presets and serde_roundtrip_all_modifiers still pass.
